title: Egyptian Pharaohs – Cairo & Nile Cruise – 8 Days
summary: Complete Egyptian journey: Pyramids, Egyptian Museum, Nile cruise from Luxor to Aswan, Abu Simbel.
description: Uncover ancient secrets with expert guides, enjoy 5-star cruise amenities, and marvel at temples.
price_label: per person sharing (based on double cabin)
inclusions: All entrance fees and guided tours

days.title: Arrival Cairo
days.summary: Meet at Cairo airport, transfer to hotel. Optional evening sound & light show at Pyramids.

days.title: Cairo – Pyramids, Sphinx & Egyptian Museum
days.summary: Full-day tour: Giza Plateau, Great Pyramid interior (optional), and Tutankhamun treasures.

days.title: Fly to Luxor – Embark Nile Cruise – East Bank Temples
days.summary: Morning flight to Luxor, board MS Memphis, visit Karnak and Luxor Temples.

days.title: Luxor West Bank – Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut Temple
days.summary: Cross to West Bank: Tutankhamun's tomb, Ramses VI, Deir el-Bahari, Colossi of Memnon.

days.title: Sail to Edfu & Kom Ombo Temples
days.summary: Morning visit to Horus Temple at Edfu, afternoon Kom Ombo (crocodile god). Sail to Aswan.

days.title: Aswan – High Dam, Philae Temple, Unfinished Obelisk
days.summary: Morning Aswan sights, afternoon optional felucca ride on the Nile.

days.title: Abu Simbel Excursion – Fly back to Cairo
days.summary: Early morning drive to Abu Simbel temples of Ramses II. Afternoon flight to Cairo.

days.title: Departure Cairo
days.summary: Breakfast at hotel, then transfer to Cairo International Airport.
activities: Last minute souvenir shopping at Khan el-Khalili (if time)
